factors.label: Concurrent requests
factors.help: Independent exec_command requests released together from one trial barrier.

factors.label: Workspace profile
factors.help: Deterministic materialized fixture scale available to the command.

factors.label: Session boundary
factors.help: Explicit measures against a prepared session; automatic includes create, publish, and destroy lifecycle.

factors.label: Command case
factors.help: Compile-time allowlisted bounded shell template; plans cannot submit arbitrary command text.

identity.label: Batch makespan
identity.help: Barrier release until the last issued product request reaches a terminal response.

identity.label: Daemon CPU time
identity.help: Daemon cumulative CPU-time delta.

identity.label: Daemon RSS
identity.help: Maximum resident bytes of the sandbox daemon.

identity.label: Host free space
identity.help: Minimum free bytes on the benchmark volume.

identity.label: Registered metric
identity.help: Persisted metric from the immutable definition snapshot.

identity.label: Request latency
identity.help: One issued product request from send until its final response is decoded.

identity.label: Runner RSS
identity.help: Maximum resident bytes of the benchmark runner.

identity.label: Sandbox block reads
identity.help: Sandbox cumulative block-read byte counter delta over the trial window.

identity.label: Sandbox block writes
identity.help: Sandbox cumulative block-write byte counter delta over the trial window.

identity.label: Sandbox CPU time
identity.help: Sandbox cumulative cgroup CPU-use counter delta over the trial window.

identity.label: Sandbox memory current
identity.help: Maximum sampled sandbox cgroup memory.current bytes.

identity.label: Sandbox memory peak
identity.help: Sandbox cgroup memory.peak, or an explicitly sampled peak when unavailable.

identity.label: Setup
identity.help: Harness setup time outside the primary operation window.

identity.label: Teardown
identity.help: Owned cleanup and baseline verification time outside the primary operation window.

identity.label: Throughput
identity.help: Successful issued product requests divided by batch makespan seconds.

identity.label: Registered metric
identity.help: Persisted metric from the immutable definition snapshot.

identity.label: Verification
identity.help: Correctness verification time outside the primary operation window.

identity.label: Workspace allocated bytes
identity.help: Maximum allocated filesystem bytes in the named workspace scope.

identity.label: Workspace files
identity.help: Maximum file count in the workspace scope.

identity.label: Workspace logical bytes
identity.help: Maximum logical file bytes in the named workspace scope.

checks.label: Command exit status
checks.help: The product result reports the case's exact expected exit status.

checks.label: Bounded command output
checks.help: Stored stdout and stderr satisfy the case contract, cap, and digest checks.

checks.label: Command lifecycle
checks.help: Session ownership and cleanup match the selected explicit or automatic boundary.

factors.label: Live sessions N
factors.help: Prepared sessions exposed to the post-commit remount sweep; N is load, never request concurrency.

factors.label: Requested migration ratio
factors.help: Fixture request for the share of live sessions eligible to migrate, rounded to the nearest whole session with halves upward; observed M remains evidence.

factors.label: Remount parallelism W
factors.help: Fixed bounded width of the live-session remount sweep inside the single squash request.

factors.label: Squashable blocks B
factors.help: Number of contiguous deterministic layer blocks prepared for the squash request.

factors.label: Layers per block
factors.help: Published layers in each squashable block of the prepared topology.

factors.label: Payload bytes
factors.help: Deterministically materialized payload bytes contributed by each published layer.

factors.label: Session activity
factors.help: Whether prepared live sessions remain idle or perform bounded deterministic activity before squash.
